min_runtime_shadow_events.description: Runtime shadow sample is too small to trust governance trendlines.

max_unknown_principal_shadow_events.description: Unknown principals should not appear in governed runtime shadow traffic.

max_unknown_surface_shadow_events.description: Unknown invocation surfaces indicate normalization drift.

max_merchant_sweep_blocked_events.description: Merchant-sweep probes are elevated in sampled runtime traffic.

max_deep_pagination_blocked_events.description: Deep-pagination probing is elevated in sampled runtime traffic.

max_checkout_handoff_not_allowed_events.description: Unexpected checkout handoff attempts outside allowlist should be rare.
